message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml
left to right direction
skinparam packageStyle rectangle

actor "ScooterOwner\nSavManager\nSavTechnicien" as User
database "Claims" as ClaimsDB
boundary "ClaimsService" as Service
entity "Claim" as ClaimEntity

User -> ClaimsDB : getClaimDetail(Id)
activate ClaimsDB
ClaimsDB -> Service : getClaimDetail(Id)
activate Service
Service -> ClaimEntity : getClaimDetail(Id)
activate ClaimEntity

alt claim is found
    ClaimEntity --> Service : claimDetail
    deactivate ClaimEntity
    Service --> ClaimsDB : claimDetail
    deactivate Service
    ClaimsDB --> User : claimDetail
else claim is not found
    ClaimEntity --> Service : claimNotFound
    deactivate ClaimEntity
    Service --> ClaimsDB : claimNotFound
    deactivate Service
    ClaimsDB --> User : claimNotFound
end
deactivate ClaimsDB

User -> ClaimsDB : getClaimTechnicienHistory()
activate ClaimsDB
ClaimsDB -> ClaimsDB : toggleTechnicienHistory()
activate ClaimsDB
ClaimsDB --> User : technicienHistory
deactivate ClaimsDB
deactivate ClaimsDB

User -> ClaimsDB : getClaimStatusHistory()
activate ClaimsDB
ClaimsDB -> ClaimsDB : toggleStatusHistory()
activate ClaimsDB
ClaimsDB --> User : statusHistory
deactivate ClaimsDB
deactivate ClaimsDB

@enduml
```
